summary: Phase 5 (Invitation Banner) and Phase 6 (Milestones Wallet) - All tests pass. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass. Frontend: MilestonesSection renders correctly with all data-testid attributes, invitation banner shows for users with existing accounts.

backend_pytest: ✅ GET /api/wallet/milestones returns correct structure (attended_count, organized_count, milestones, next_milestone, show_organizer_cta)
✅ Each milestone has correct structure (threshold, reached, label)
✅ Milestones reached logic correct based on attended_count
✅ show_organizer_cta is false when user has organized appointments
✅ Invitation endpoint returns proper error for invalid token
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login page loads at /signin with data-testid attributes
✅ Login flow works with test credentials
✅ All 7 milestone badges present: [1, 3, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100] with data-testid='milestone-badge-{n}'
✅ Progress bar visible with data-testid='milestones-progress-bar' showing 15/25
✅ Organizer CTA not visible (correct - user has organized appointments)
✅ Invitation banner visible when has_existing_account=true and status=invited
✅ Login link has data-testid='existing-account-login-link' with correct redirect

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/wallet/milestones correctly counts attended engagements from attendance_records
✅ Milestones thresholds hardcoded as [1, 3, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100] - matches requirements
✅ has_existing_account computed dynamically from users collection (verified users)
✅ Invitation banner only shows when has_existing_account=true AND status='invited'
✅ Login redirect URL correctly includes invitation token
seed_data_creation: Updated participant 2ee6406d-9682-4f07-8228-89177ecb0d02 email to testuser_audit@nlyt.app to test has_existing_account banner
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 and 6 complete. Milestones endpoint returns attended_count=15 for test user (has reached milestones 1,3,5,10). Organizer CTA not shown because user has organized_count=132. Invitation banner shows for participants whose email matches a verified user account. Login route is /signin not /login.

phase_5_invitation_banner.banner_visibility: VERIFIED - Shows when has_existing_account=true AND status=invited

phase_6_milestones.endpoint_structure: VERIFIED - Returns attended_count, organized_count, milestones, next_milestone, show_organizer_cta
